notes: The partition name fixes the per-node resource share: GPUs, CPUs (36 per GPU), and memory (400GB per GPU).
Default wall time is 12 hours if --time is omitted; maximum is 96 hours except on 4n4gpu-p (unlimited).
Compute nodes have ~7TB local NVMe scratch at $USER_SCRATCH_DIR, deleted automatically when the job ends.
Slurm commands require a login shell environment.
Compute nodes are aarch64 — binaries and Python wheels built for x86_64 will not run.

modules.nvhpc-nompi: NVHPC without MPI; use when you manage MPI yourself
modules.nvhpc-hpcx-cuda13: NVHPC with HPC-X and CUDA 13 fixed
modules.nvhpc-byo-compiler: Use the system GCC (bring your own compiler)

storage.node_local_scratch: $USER_SCRATCH_DIR (~7TB NVMe, deleted after the job ends)
